title: Creating a marketing work flow and tracking
excerpt:
Looking for someone to assist with proper setup of first phase of setting up marketing boards for a law firm. 
Must be located in the USA and have references.

posts.author: Legal007 (Howard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for someone to assist with proper setup of first phase of setting up marketing boards for a law firm.
Must be located in the USA and have references.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Howard!

We’d highly recommend taking a look at our directory of monday.com certified partners. You can find a partner near you here: monday.com/p/find-a-partner

Let us know if you have any questions!

posts.author: JamieRobles (JamieRobles)
posts.cookedHtml: Setting up marketing boards for a law firm can be quite a task, but don’t worry, you’re in the right place to find the assistance you need. I wanted to share an idea that might help streamline your marketing workflow and tracking. Have you considered using a traffic bot? It’s a tool that can automate website visits and generate traffic, which can be beneficial for marketing purposes. It could potentially save you time and effort while increasing visibility for your law firm. However, it’s important to do thorough research and choose a reputable tool that aligns with your goals.
